label: Financial, Legal & Compliance Pak
blurb: Financial, Legal & Compliance. Risk mitigation and professional services automation.

skills.label: Tax Deduction Categorizer
skills.method: Analyzes corporate credit card feeds, flags meals/entertainment vs. software based on IRS rules.

skills.label: Bank Reconciliation Matcher
skills.method: Compares raw Plaid bank feeds to Xero/QuickBooks ledgers, matching by amount and date fuzziness.

skills.label: Contract Renewal Monitor
skills.method: Extracts auto-renew dates and 30-day notice periods from 100s of PDFs, creates calendar alerts.
trigger_examples: stops companies from being locked into bad saas deals

skills.label: Nda Redliner
skills.method: Scans third-party NDAs, flags non-standard clauses (e.g., unlimited liability), suggests standard edits.
trigger_examples: cuts legal review time from days to minutes

skills.label: Vendor W9 Chaser
skills.method: Identifies contractors paid \>$600, emails them requesting W-9s, halts payment until received.

skills.label: Payroll Anomaly Detector
skills.method: Scans bi-weekly payroll runs, flags sudden overtime spikes or unauthorized bonuses.
trigger_examples: catches payroll theft/errors before money leaves

skills.label: Gdpr Data Deletion Sweep
skills.method: Takes a user email, queries 5 databases via API, deletes records, generates proof log.

skills.label: Soc2 Evidence Collector
skills.method: Takes screenshots of AWS/GitHub configs daily, files them in compliance folders.
trigger_examples: turns a $50k audit headache into a background task

skills.label: Cap Table Updater
skills.method: Reads signed option grants, updates Carta/spreadsheet with new vesting schedules.
